title: T-001 — product table + fa compat view DDL (NPD-a.6)
prompt:
# T-001 — product table + fa compat view DDL (NPD-a.6)

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §4.2, §13.2, v3.3 changelog (ADR-034 Option B)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Introduce the physical `product` table holding the FA aggregate (69 cols + ext_jsonb + private_jsonb + R13 audit/AI cols) plus the read-only `fa` SQL view aliasing it for backwards compatibility through Phase C1.

## Implementation contract
1. New Drizzle migration `packages/db/migrations/0010_product_and_fa_view.sql` containing CREATE TABLE product (per §4.2 DDL, but renamed `fa`→`product`) + ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + the two indexes specified + `CREATE VIEW fa AS SELECT * FROM product;` with `security_invoker = true`.
2. Drizzle ORM schema entry in `packages/db/src/schema/product.ts` mirroring the columns; export typed Insert/Select.
3. RLS policy `tenant_isolation_product` on (tenant_id = current_setting('app.tenant_id')::uuid).
4. fa view is read-only: emit no triggers; verify INSERT/UPDATE on `fa` view fails by default.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0010_product_and_fa_view.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/product.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/product-and-fa-view.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fresh DB, when migration 0010 runs, then `\d product` lists all 69 cols + ext_jsonb + private_jsonb + schema_version + R13 audit cols + RLS=enabled
2. Given the migration is applied, when `SELECT * FROM fa LIMIT 1` runs as tenant A and tenant B, then each only sees its own tenant rows (RLS enforced via product table policy)
3. Given the fa view exists, when `INSERT INTO fa(product_code, tenant_id) VALUES (...)` runs, then it fails with 'cannot insert into view' (read-only confirmed)

## Test strategy
- RED: write packages/db/__tests__/product-and-fa-view.test.ts asserting all three ACs before migration exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test product-and-fa-view'

## Risk red lines
- Do not drop `fa` table if pre-existing — migration must error and require explicit `--allow-rename` flag
- Do not skip RLS policy
- Do not add cascade DELETE on tenant FK (tenants are not deleted in this migration)

pipeline_inputs.description: Create product physical table (renamed from fa per ADR-034 Option B) + fa read-only compat view + RLS + Drizzle schema entry.
pipeline_inputs.details: Migration 0010 emits CREATE TABLE product (...69 cols + JSONB extensions + R13 audit cols), ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY, two specified indexes, and CREATE VIEW fa AS SELECT * FROM product (security_invoker=true). Drizzle schema mirrors columns. Tests verify RLS isolation and view read-only enforcement.
